case_title: DORIA MOY VS. LEO PAUL KOULOS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-31-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-31-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2018 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MOY, DORIA AS TO DEFENDANT KOULOS, LEO PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $60.00) SERVED JUL-22-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KOULOS, LEO PAUL

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KOULOS, LEO PAUL
